chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constt.Petition No.D-1074 of 2022. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections ‘A’. 2. For hearing of main case. 12.04.2023 Mr. Abdul Rehman Bhutto, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Addl.A.G, Sindh =*=*=*=*=*=*=*=*= The petitioners by way of instant petition have sought for direction against the respondents to release the arrears of family pension to them without fail. Two cheques worth Rs.25000/- each towards family pension of the petitioners have been furnished by Mr.Imam Bux, Secretary Union Council Saifal, Taluka Tangwani, District Kashmore @ Kandhkot, those are taken on record, to be collected by the petitioners to their convenience from the Accountant of this Court. A chart of payment error is also filed by him; it is taken on record, copy whereof is provided to learned counsel for the petitioners. It is stated by Mr.Imam Bux, Secretary, Union Council Saifal, Taluka Tangwani, District Kashmore @ Kandhkot that the arrears of pension of late employee Muhammad Sallah Khan Nindwani would be cleared by depositing two cheques worth Rs.25,000/- each, with Accountant of this Court on or before 8th of every Calendar month, to be collected by the petitioners. The learned counsel for the petitioners being satisfied with the above statement, does not press the instant petition, it is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE
